caption: A gathering of men is seated in a tiered auditorium with green upholstered seating and an ornate, carved wooden railing in the foreground. The men are dressed in various styles of attire, including white traditional Indian kurtas, Western-style button-down shirts, and several wearing dark blazers or waistcoats. Some men wear turbans, while others are bareheaded. Most of the individuals are facing forward, maintaining still postures and neutral expressions as they listen or observe. Between the frames, there is very little movement; the people remain in their seats, and the overall composition of the scene remains static. No on-screen text, logos, or electronic equipment are visible, and there are no interactions between the individuals shown. The lighting is consistent and bright throughout the scene, illuminating the rows of participants.
